prompt: A young Japanese woman wears a sand-toned swimsuit, a rose-gold sheer wrap billowing above her head like a canopy caught in the golden hour wind. Medium wide shot, dramatic silhouette against a warm glowing desert horizon, subject positioned lower third of frame with the wrap filling negative space above. Vertical portrait orientation, 2:3 aspect ratio. Render with photographic realism: subtle ISO 400 film grain in shadow areas, avoid over-smoothed CG textures. Skin: subsurface scattering and micro-texture. Hair: subtle natural imperfection.
promptEn: A young Japanese woman wears a sand-toned swimsuit, a rose-gold sheer wrap billowing above her head like a canopy caught in the golden hour wind. Medium wide shot, dramatic silhouette against a warm glowing desert horizon, subject positioned lower third of frame with the wrap filling negative space above. Vertical portrait orientation, 2:3 aspect ratio. Render with photographic realism: subtle ISO 400 film grain in shadow areas, avoid over-smoothed CG textures. Skin: subsurface scattering and micro-texture. Hair: subtle natural imperfection.
promptZh: 一位 年轻日本女性 穿着 沙色泳装，搭配玫瑰金透明围裹裙，裙摆在黄金时刻的风中如天幕般在头顶飘扬。中远景镜头，以 温暖发光的沙漠地平线 为背景呈现戏剧性的剪影，主体位于画面下三分之一处，围裹裙填满上方的负空间。垂直人像构图，2:3 纵横比。渲染呈现摄影级真实感：阴影区域带有细微的 ISO 400 胶片颗粒，避免过度平滑的 CG 质感。皮肤：次表面散射和微纹理。头发：细微的自然瑕疵。
